title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies:
Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail Digital Technologies!
